text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇶 Iraq’s Shiite Coordination Framework official nominne is businessman Ali al‑Zaidi who holds a master’s in finance and banking, is director of Al‑Janoob Islamic Bank (under US sanctions since 2024 for alleged money laundering and illegal dollar use), CEO…" ⚡️ 🇮🇶 Shafaq News : Iraq’s Shiite Coordination Framework has nominated businessman Ali al‑Zaidi as a compromise candidate for prime minister, after caretaker Prime Minister Mohammed Shia al‑Sudani and State of Law leader Nouri al‑Maliki agreed on his name at a meeting hosted by Popular Mobilisation Forces chairman Falih al‑Fayyadh. He also has ties to Muqtada al‑Sadr’s office. Political sources said Zaidi may face challenges in forming a government and securing parliamentary approval. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇶 伊拉克什叶派协调框架的官方提名人是商人阿里·扎伊迪（Ali al‑Zaidi），他拥有金融与银行学硕士学位，是南方伊斯兰银行（Al‑Janoob Islamic Bank，因涉嫌洗钱和非法使用美元自2024年起受美国制裁）的董事，也是……” ⚡️ 🇮🇶 Shafaq News：伊拉克什叶派协调框架已提名商人阿里·扎伊迪为总理妥协候选人，此前看守总理穆罕默德·希亚·苏达尼（Mohammed Shia al‑Sudani）和法治国家联盟领导人努里·马利基（Nouri al‑Maliki）在人民动员力量（PMF）主席法利赫·法耶德（Falih al‑Fayyadh）主持的会议上就其人选达成一致。他与穆克塔达·萨德尔（Muqtada al‑Sadr）的办公室也有联系。政治消息人士称，扎伊迪在组建政府和获得议会批准方面可能面临挑战。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇶 Iraq’s Coordination Framework has officially nominated Ali al‑Zaidi as its candidate for prime minister. Iraqi Parliament Speaker Mohammed al‑Halbousi has arrived at Baghdad Palace, and First Deputy Speaker Adnan Faihan has also arrived, as the framework…" ⚡️ 🇮🇶 Iraq’s Shiite Coordination Framework official nominne is businessman Ali al‑Zaidi who holds a master’s in finance and banking, is director of Al‑Janoob Islamic Bank (under US sanctions since 2024 for alleged money laundering and illegal dollar use), CEO of Dijlah TV, chairman of Al‑Shaab University, and owns Taawon Hypermarket. The nomination was agreed by outgoing Prime Minister Sudani and Nouri al‑Maliki at a meeting hosted by PMF chairman Falih al‑Fayyadh. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇶 伊拉克协调框架已正式提名阿里·扎伊迪为其总理候选人。伊拉克议会议长穆罕默德·哈尔布西（Mohammed al‑Halbousi）已抵达巴格达宫，第一副议长阿德南·法伊汉（Adnan Faihan）也已抵达，因为该框架……” ⚡️ 🇮🇶 伊拉克什叶派协调框架的官方提名人是商人阿里·扎伊迪，他拥有金融与银行学硕士学位，是南方伊斯兰银行（因涉嫌洗钱和非法使用美元自2024年起受美国制裁）的董事、迪杰拉电视台（Dijlah TV）首席执行官、阿尔沙布大学（Al‑Shaab University）董事长，并拥有Taawon大卖场。该提名由即将离任的总理苏达尼和努里·马利基在人民动员力量主席法利赫·法耶德主持的会议上达成一致。@wfwitness

text: 🔄 Forwarded from Mediterranean Man: ⚡️ 🇲🇱 In Gao, Mali, most of the city has fell into the hands of the FLA and Al-Qaeda, Russian elements have, for once, decided not to retreat and instead stay barricaded inside the city limits with their Malian allies. Gunfights have been rare to break out this day as trying to remove the Malians and the Russians from their positions will heavily cost FLA/JNIM alot of soldiers, but it is unlikely for the Malians and the Russians to survive a prolonged siege if it was fought to the end, as reinforcements are simply non-existent. @medmannews
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 Mediterranean Man：⚡️ 🇲🇱 在马里加奥，该市大部分地区已落入FLA和基地组织手中，俄罗斯人员破天荒地决定不撤退，而是与他们的马里盟友一起在城市范围内筑垒固守。今天几乎没有发生枪战，因为试图将马里人和俄罗斯人从阵地中清除将使FLA/JNIM付出大量士兵的代价，但如果战斗到底，马里人和俄罗斯人不太可能在长期的围困中幸存，因为根本没有增援部队。@medmannews

text: King Charles has arrived in the U.S., where he will meet with Trump.
text_zh: 查尔斯国王已抵达美国，他将在那里会见特朗普。

text: ❗️ Israeli attacks targeted the following Lebanese towns and cities: Nabatieh, Byout Al-Seyyed, Harees, Touleen, Qana, Sidqeen, Kfour, Baraacheet etc At least one resulted in a martyr and other injuries. Another attack targeted near Qaaqeyeh bridge.
text_zh: ❗️ 以色列袭击了以下黎巴嫩城镇和城市：纳巴泰（Nabatieh）、Byout Al-Seyyed、哈里斯（Harees）、图林（Touleen）、加纳（Qana）、Sidqeen、Kfour、Baraacheet等。至少造成一名烈士和其他人受伤。另一次袭击针对Qaaqeyeh桥附近。

text: Open Source Intel White House Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt: "People LISTEN and when you have mentally disturbed individuals who are listening to this crazed rhetoric about the President, it inspires them." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048827923403059271/video/1 tweet

text: Open Source Intel Gov. Jeff Landry: "This is why the president should get his ballroom. You could have the White House Correspondents dinner there and not have to worry about these things. I think the president is just a stand-up of a fella. He's the most American president we've had in so long." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048827870936444949/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 杰夫·兰德里（Jeff Landry）州长：“这就是为什么总统应该拥有他的宴会厅。你可以在那里举行白宫记者晚宴，而不必担心这些事情。我认为总统只是一个站得住脚的人。他是我们这么久以来拥有的最美国化的总统。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048827870936444949/video/1 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇶 Mawazin: Iraq’s Shiite Coordination Framework has reportedly agreed to nominate Ali al‑Zaidi, owner of the South Bank (Masarif al‑Junub), as a compromise candidate for prime minister. The move comes after the framework failed to agree on previous candidates…" ⚡️ 🇮🇶 Iraq’s Coordination Framework has officially nominated Ali al‑Zaidi as its candidate for prime minister. Iraqi Parliament Speaker Mohammed al‑Halbousi has arrived at Baghdad Palace, and First Deputy Speaker Adnan Faihan has also arrived, as the framework holds a meeting on the nomination. The Coordination Framework praised the outgoing government of Prime Minister Mohammed Shia al‑Sudani for its national and responsible performance over three and a half years in facing economic, regional and international challenges. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇶 Mawazin：据报道，伊拉克什叶派协调框架已同意提名南方银行（Masarif al‑Junub）的所有者阿里·扎伊迪为总理妥协候选人。此举是在该框架未能就之前的候选人达成一致后做出的……” ⚡️ 🇮🇶 伊拉克协调框架已正式提名阿里·扎伊迪为其总理候选人。伊拉克议会议长穆罕默德·哈尔布西已抵达巴格达宫，第一副议长阿德南·法伊汉也已抵达，因为该框架正在就提名举行会议。协调框架赞扬了即将离任的穆罕默德·希亚·苏达尼总理政府在三年半的时间里在面对经济、区域和国际挑战时所表现出的国家和负责任的表现。@wfwitness

text: 🏁 NATO is considering scrapping its annual summits amid deepening internal fractures, Reuters reports. Member states are floating a shift to biennial meetings or cancelling the 2028 summit altogether. The move is framed as easing tensions, including with Trump, and streamlining decision-making, but reads more like damage control for an alliance struggling to maintain a unified front. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🏁 据路透社报道，由于内部裂痕加深，北约正在考虑取消其年度峰会。成员国正在提议转向两年一次的会议，或者完全取消2028年的峰会。此举被描述为缓解紧张局势（包括与特朗普的紧张关系）并简化决策过程，但看起来更像是为了维持统一战线而苦苦挣扎的联盟的损害控制。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Former CIA Officer John Kiriakou: I don’t think the Israelis should be treated any differently than the Brits or the French or the Greeks… why do they get special treatment? I just don’t understand.
text_zh: 前中情局官员约翰·基里亚库（John Kiriakou）：我不认为以色列人应该受到与英国人、法国人或希腊人不同的对待……为什么他们会得到特殊待遇？我只是不明白。

text: Tucker Carlson: Where did Trump get the idea that Iran would collapse swiftly? John Kiriakou: He could only have gotten that idea from Benjamin Netanyahu. That's it, because the CIA analysis has been consistent over the course of decades. We can't just fire a couple of rockets and take down a government in a country of 93 million people. That's just not the way real life works. They're going to rally around their leadership because we're outsiders.
text_zh: 塔克·卡尔森：特朗普认为伊朗会迅速崩溃的想法是从哪里来的？约翰·基里亚库：他只能是从本雅明·内塔尼亚胡那里得到这个想法。就是这样，因为几十年来中央情报局的分析一直是一致的。我们不能仅仅发射几枚火箭就推翻一个拥有9300万人口国家的政府。现实生活根本不是这样运作的。他们会团结在他们的领导层周围，因为我们是外来者。

text: 🇮🇷 🇪🇺 Iranian MFA Spokesman Esmaeil Baqaei comments on Reich Gauleitierin von der Leyen's statement that it's "too early to lift sanctions" on Iran. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇪🇺 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊就“帝国大区长”冯德莱恩关于对伊朗实施制裁“为时尚早”的声明发表评论。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Former CIA Officer John Kiriakou: I feel like sometimes we act in Israel's best interests rather than in our own best interests. The Israelis, of course, are going to jump up and down and yell about the Irish and Spanish and the Italians, right? But we should, you know, let them vent and then do what's in the best interest of the United States.
text_zh: 前中央情报局官员约翰·基里亚库：我觉得有时我们是在为以色列的最佳利益行事，而不是为了我们自己的最佳利益。当然，以色列人会跳起来对爱尔兰人、西班牙人和意大利人叫嚷，对吧？但我们应该，你知道，让他们发泄一下，然后做符合美国最佳利益的事情。

text: ⚡️ 🇷🇺 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 IRNA: The Kremlin has not ruled out the possibility of contacting Washington after Russian President Putin’s meeting with Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi in St. Petersburg. Yuri Ushakov, Putin’s foreign policy aide, said Moscow is also reviewing messages received from the United States and Israel before deciding on its next steps. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇷🇺 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 IRNA：克里姆林宫并未排除在俄罗斯总统普京与伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格希在圣彼得堡会晤后，与华盛顿进行接触的可能性。普京的外交政策助手尤里·乌沙科夫表示，莫斯科也在审查从美国和以色列收到的信息，然后再决定下一步行动。 @wfwitness

text: Ukraine's Foreign Minister Andrii Sybiha: It is difficult to understand Israel’s lack of appropriate response to Ukraine’s legitimate request regarding the previous vessel that delivered stolen goods to Haifa. Now that another such vessel has arrived in Haifa, we once again warn Israel against accepting the stolen grain and harming our relations.
text_zh: 乌克兰外交部长安德烈·西比哈：很难理解以色列为何对乌克兰就此前那艘向海法运送赃物的船只提出的正当要求缺乏适当回应。现在又有一艘此类船只抵达海法，我们再次警告以色列，不要接收被盗的谷物，以免损害我们的关系。

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇸🇦 🇦🇪 Kan: Growing tensions between Lebanese President Aoun and Hezbollah leader Qassem reflect increasing strains inside Lebanon’s domestic political arena. Security has been reinforced around the Beirut home of diplomat Simon Karam, who is expected to head the Lebanese delegation for direct negotiations with Israel. The negotiations are also straining the Gulf region. the UAE is pushing Lebanon toward normalisation with Israel under an Abraham Accords framework, while Saudi Arabia is said to favour a formula in which Hezbollah disarms in exchange for an Israeli withdrawal from Lebanese territory, and is less supportive of immediate normalisation. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇸🇦 🇦🇪 Kan：黎巴嫩总统奥恩与真主党领导人卡西姆之间日益紧张的关系，反映出黎巴嫩国内政治舞台上的矛盾不断加剧。外交官西蒙·卡拉姆在贝鲁特的住所周围加强了安保，预计他将率领黎巴嫩代表团与以色列进行直接谈判。这些谈判也让海湾地区感到紧张。阿联酋正在推动黎巴嫩在《亚伯拉罕协议》框架下与以色列实现关系正常化，而据称沙特阿拉伯倾向于一种方案，即真主党解除武装以换取以色列从黎巴嫩领土撤军，沙特对立即实现关系正常化的支持力度较小。 @wfwitness

text: 🇹🇭 🇨🇳 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Thai FM Sihasak Phuangketkeow : We asked China for help to get our 8 ships through the Strait of Hormuz, and they told us they are struggling to free 70 of their own ships. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇹🇭 🇨🇳 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 泰国外交部长西哈萨·普昂格特凯：我们请求中国帮助我们的8艘船只通过霍尔木兹海峡，但他们告诉我们，他们自己也在努力解救70艘被困的船只。 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: Open Source Intel Claims in Iran: A blogger published a video showing an asphalt road in the desert near the Isfahan nuclear facility, claiming it was built by Mossad. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048825431638388756/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 伊朗开源情报声称：一位博主发布了一段视频，展示了伊斯法罕核设施附近沙漠中的一条沥青路，声称这是摩萨德修建的。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048825431638388756/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel German Chancellor Merz on Iran: "The U.S. and Israel assumed at the very beginning that this problem could be solved within a few days. But today we must acknowledge: it has not been solved. That is why we, from the European side, are also seeking a diplomatic solution. I hope that we succeed, but I am not certain." tweet

text: Nuno Felix RT @BrettErickson28 : @Felix_Nuno It was an analysis thrown together due to a rapidly launched and ill-conceived military campaign. It didn't have the "good fortune" to be sufficiently pressure-tested. If it was, the holes in the assessment would've drowned it from the start. tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转推 @BrettErickson28 ：@Felix_Nuno 这是一份由于仓促发起且构思不周的军事行动而拼凑出来的分析。它没有“好运”经过充分的压力测试。如果经过测试，评估中的漏洞从一开始就会将其淹没。 推文

text: Nuno Felix This right here is solid, solid analysis. The primary issues I see with Miad’s notorious analysis is the fundamental lack of understanding as it pertains to countries under economic warfare pressures, and the overwhelming buy-in from a Trump Administration desperate for solutions. Let’s start with the latter. Miad is smart. Full stop, irrefutable. FDD… also sharp. But the adoption of this analysis by the White House and Treasury was not made because it was the BEST analysis that existed at the time. It was the ONLY analysis that existed at the time. That’s the problem. The Trump Administration, clear as day, entered this conflict with insufficient planning, and throughout the conflict has been entirely outclassed from a STRATEGIC perspective. Iran controls the Strait, Iran has extensive asymmetric capabilities, and Iran knows that the Trump Administration is caught in a politically untenable quagmire. Miad and FDD offered the Trump Admin a solution to their poor preparation, and they took it. The issue, however, is that Miad’s analysis was not pressure tested. It didn’t have the gift of public discourse before implementation. It did not get the opportunity to be refined and adjusted. And now we see the fallout from it. The lack of understanding aspect is truly critical, and we see this playing out with the VLCC’s loading some 8M barrels from Kharg in the last two days, of which, 6M has been loaded today alone. Miad’s analysis that points to oil well shut-ins, hyperinflation, etc., operated on the core assumption that Kharg fills capacity at a rate of 1.0M-1.1M bpd, and had at the time of the blockade implementation, 13M barrels of spare capacity, thus a projection of 13 days to shut-in. The core issue that Miad misses in his analysis, is that it operates on a status quo scenario. That’s not how countries under economic pressure operate. We saw this extensively with Russia who had massive sanctions imposed after their 2022 (2014) invasion of Ukraine. Believe it or not, they didn’t simply just roll over and call it a day. They got creative. They innovated. They came up with new methods of sanctions-evasion. They mastered known methods. Iran is the exact same. Pulling a retired VLCC out of storage allowed for an additional 2M barrels to be loaded, thus extending the timeline by +2 days. Now, we have another 6M barrels loaded, +6 days. At this point, Miad is admitting that around 18M barrels can be loaded onto available tankers. There is a HUGE difference to the global economy between a 13 day timeline and a 31 day timeline. But this still doesn’t totally account for what we will see. I don’t have a crystal ball. I don’t know what Iran will do to extend this timeline further, but if one thing is clear, they will do everything they can to extend that now 31 day time horizon to 40 days. To 50 days. 60 days. And even then? It will take WEEKS if not MONTHS for it to become truly catastrophic to the point of forcing Iran to the negotiating table or creating enough public unrest for regime change movements to occur. Miad’s core premise — oil well shut-ins, hyperinflation, public unrest — is not incorrect. What is incorrect is operating on an assumption that Iran will simply roll over and call it a day. They won’t. Miad and FDD over-promised and under-delivered, and now the world will be the ones paying the price. #Iran #Oil #Sanctions #Treasury #Trump - Brett Erickson tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 这确实是扎实、扎实的分析。我认为Miad那份臭名昭著的分析存在的主要问题是，对于处于经济战压力下的国家缺乏根本性的理解，以及特朗普政府因急于寻找解决方案而全盘接受了该分析。让我们从后者开始。Miad很聪明。句号，无可辩驳。FDD……也很敏锐。但白宫和财政部采纳这份分析，并不是因为它当时是存在的“最佳”分析。它只是当时存在的“唯一”分析。这就是问题所在。特朗普政府显然在规划不足的情况下进入了这场冲突，并且在整个冲突过程中，从战略角度来看完全被对手压制。伊朗控制着海峡，拥有广泛的非对称能力，并且伊朗知道特朗普政府陷入了政治上无法维持的泥潭。Miad和FDD为特朗普政府提供了一个解决其准备不足问题的方案，他们接受了。然而，问题在于Miad的分析没有经过压力测试。在实施之前，它没有经过公众讨论的洗礼。它没有机会得到完善和调整。现在我们看到了由此产生的后果。缺乏理解这一点确实至关重要，我们看到过去两天VLCC（超大型油轮）从哈尔格岛装载了约800万桶石油，其中仅今天就装载了600万桶，这充分说明了这一点。Miad指出油井停产、恶性通货膨胀等的分析，其核心假设是哈尔格岛以每天100万至110万桶的速度装载，并且在封锁实施时有1300万桶的备用容量，因此预测13天内停产。Miad在分析中忽略的核心问题是，它是在现状情景下运作的。处于经济压力下的国家不是这样运作的。我们在俄罗斯身上看到了这一点，他们在2022年（2014年）入侵乌克兰后受到了大规模制裁。信不信由你，他们并没有简单地屈服并就此罢休。他们发挥了创造力。他们进行了创新。他们想出了规避制裁的新方法。他们掌握了已知的方法。伊朗完全一样。从仓库中拉出一艘退役的VLCC，额外装载了200万桶石油，从而将时间线延长了2天。现在，我们又装载了600万桶，延长了6天。在这一点上，Miad承认大约有1800万桶石油可以装载到现有的油轮上。对于全球经济来说，13天的时间线和31天的时间线之间存在巨大的差异。但这仍然不能完全解释我们将看到的情况。我没有水晶球。我不知道伊朗会采取什么措施来进一步延长这个时间线，但如果有一点是明确的，那就是他们会尽一切努力将现在的31天时间跨度延长到40天。到50天。60天。即便如此呢？这需要数周甚至数月的时间，才会变得真正灾难性，从而迫使伊朗回到谈判桌前，或者引发足够的公众动荡以导致政权更迭。Miad的核心前提——油井停产、恶性通货膨胀、公众动荡——并非不正确。不正确的是基于伊朗会简单地屈服并就此罢休的假设。他们不会。Miad和FDD承诺过多但交付不足，现在世界将为此付出代价。 #Iran #Oil #Sanctions #Treasury #Trump - Brett Erickson 推文

text: Open Source Intel White House Press Secretary praised Secret Service for stopping Saturday evening's perpetrator "quickly," and confirmed Chief of Staff Susie Wiles will convene a meeting early this week with DHS leadership, Secret Service, and the White House operations team to review presidential security. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 白宫新闻秘书称赞特勤局“迅速”阻止了周六晚上的肇事者，并确认幕僚长苏西·怀尔斯将于本周初召集国土安全部领导层、特勤局和白宫运营团队开会，审查总统安保工作。 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @BrettErickson28 : It is now day 14 of “13 days to flatten the Iranian’s oil” 1/10 The U.S. naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz would cost Iran approximately $276M/day in lost exports and disrupt $159M/day in imports, a combined economic damage of ~$435M/day, or $13B/month. Over 90% of Iran's $109.7B in annual trade transits the Persian Gulf. Oil/gas accounts for 80% of government export earnings and 23.7% of GDP. Kharg Island alone generates ~$53B/year, or as I noted to @TIME, "$78 billion a year in energy revenue. - Miad Maleki tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转推 @BrettErickson28 ：今天是“13天内压垮伊朗石油”的第14天 1/10 美国对霍尔木兹海峡的海上封锁将使伊朗每天损失约2.76亿美元的出口，并扰乱每天1.59亿美元的进口，总经济损失约为每天4.35亿美元，或每月130亿美元。伊朗每年1097亿美元贸易额的90%以上通过波斯湾。石油/天然气占政府出口收入的80%和GDP的23.7%。仅哈尔格岛每年就产生约530亿美元的收入，或者正如我向 @TIME 指出的那样，“每年780亿美元的能源收入。 - Miad Maleki 推文

text: OSINTtechnical RT @hntrbrkmedia : New from Hunterbrook and @bethanymac12 : While private credit fills headlines, the risks of private equity have flown under the radar. text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 IDF announced that more than 1,900 alleged Hezbollah members have been killed in Lebanon since hostilities escalated in March. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列国防军宣布，自三月份敌对行动升级以来，已有超过1900名涉嫌真主党成员在黎巴嫩被击毙。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 Hezbollah has released footage of FPV drone strikes targeting a group of IDF troops recovering a disabled tank in southern Lebanon, followed by a failed strike on the rescue force afterward. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Kan: An Israeli Air Force investigation into yesterday’s Hezbollah drone strike in Lebanon found that two rescue helicopters were on the ground extracting wounded soldiers. The first evacuated three casualties within 34 seconds. The second was on the ground for only 24 seconds when an explosive drone struck nearby. Pilots decided to take off immediately without rear clearance. A third helicopter was scrambled to evacuate the wounded from a waypoint. No damage was found to the second helicopter. The IDF is seeking solutions to the relatively new drone threat. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 真主党发布了FPV无人机袭击的画面，目标是一群在黎巴嫩南部回收受损坦克的以色列国防军士兵，随后对救援部队的袭击未果。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Kan：以色列空军对昨天真主党在黎巴嫩发动的无人机袭击进行的调查发现，当时有两架救援直升机在地面撤离受伤士兵。第一架在34秒内撤离了三名伤员。第二架在地面仅停留了24秒，附近就遭到了爆炸无人机的袭击。飞行员决定在没有后方许可的情况下立即起飞。第三架直升机被紧急调派从航点撤离伤员。第二架直升机未发现受损。以色列国防军正在寻求应对这一相对较新的无人机威胁的解决方案。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 i24NEWS: Two Israeli sources told the network that the Lebanese government has not taken a single step against Hezbollah since the ceasefire began two weeks ago. “There were no arrests, no attempts to prevent attacks on soldiers, and no attempt…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 i24NEWS: Approximately 10 drones were launched at Israeli forces in southern Lebanon over the past 24 hours. A senior battlefield official said: “This is a bit of a surprise.” Another senior security official currently in Lebanon told i24: “We were not well prepared for this threat – only at the beginning of the campaign did we establish exercises to deal with the drones.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 i24NEWS：两名以色列消息人士告诉该媒体，自两周前停火开始以来，黎巴嫩政府没有对真主党采取任何行动。‘没有逮捕，没有试图阻止对士兵的袭击，也没有尝试……’” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 i24NEWS：过去24小时内，约有10架无人机向黎巴嫩南部的以色列军队发射。一位高级战场官员表示：‘这有点令人惊讶。’另一位目前在黎巴嫩的高级安全官员告诉i24：‘我们对这种威胁准备不足——我们只是在行动开始时才建立了应对无人机的演习。’ @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 i24NEWS: Two Israeli sources told the network that the Lebanese government has not taken a single step against Hezbollah since the ceasefire began two weeks ago. “There were no arrests, no attempts to prevent attacks on soldiers, and no attempt to prevent shooting,” one source said. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 i24NEWS：两名以色列消息人士告诉该媒体，自两周前停火开始以来，黎巴嫩政府没有对真主党采取任何行动。一位消息人士说：‘没有逮捕，没有试图阻止对士兵的袭击，也没有尝试阻止射击。’ @wfwitness

text: Germany's Merz on Iran: The U.S. and Israel assumed at the very beginning that this problem could be solved within a few days. But today we must acknowledge: it has not been solved. That is why we, from the European side, are also seeking a diplomatic solution. I hope that we succeed, but I am not certain.
text_zh: 德国的默茨谈伊朗：美国和以色列最初认为这个问题可以在几天内解决。但今天我们必须承认：它没有得到解决。这就是为什么我们欧洲方面也在寻求外交解决方案。我希望我们能成功，但我并不确定。
